summary: Full Technical SEO Audit for Zont airport transfer website. Tested 12 pages for SEO compliance including title, meta description, H1, canonical, hreflang, JSON-LD, OG tags, robots meta, robots.txt, and sitemap.xml. All critical SEO requirements pass.

home_page.title: Zont - Premium Airport Transfer Service in Europe
home_page.meta_description: Professional private driver in 120+ European cities...

paris_airport_transfer.title: Paris Airport Transfer - CDG, Orly & Beauvais

action_items: MINOR: /how-it-works and /hotels-b2b-tours-operators routes render header/footer even though they're not valid routes. Consider adding a catch-all 404 route in React Router to show a proper 'Page Not Found' component for SEO clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: SEO.js component correctly handles all SEO elements via DOM manipulation
CityTransferPage component properly passes seoUrls for multilingual hreflang support
JSON-LD schemas are correctly structured (Organization+WebSite on Home, Service on city pages, FAQPage on Help)
robots.txt and sitemap.xml are properly configured in /public folder
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full SEO audit complete. All pages have unique titles, single H1, proper meta descriptions, canonical URLs, hreflang tags (for multilingual pages), and JSON-LD structured data. Utility pages (car-selection, checkout, booking-confirmation) correctly have noindex meta. robots.txt and sitemap.xml are accessible and properly configured. Minor improvement suggested: Add 404 catch-all route for undefined URLs.

features_tested_summary.unique_title: PASS - Each page has unique title
features_tested_summary.unique_meta_description: PASS - Each page has unique meta description
features_tested_summary.single_h1: PASS - All pages have exactly 1 H1
features_tested_summary.hreflang_tags: PASS - City pages have en/fr/ru + x-default
features_tested_summary.og_tags: PASS - All required OG tags present
features_tested_summary.robots_meta: PASS - Public pages 'index, follow', utility pages 'noindex, nofollow'
features_tested_summary.html_lang: PASS - Changes based on language context
features_tested_summary.removed_routes: PASS - /how-it-works and /hotels-b2b-tours-operators not defined (React Router logs 'No routes matched')
